steps.title: Keep verb and object together
steps.content: The blank comes after the verb juxtapose and before its direct object, “images of African American women with text fragments.” A verb should not be separated from its direct object by punctuation.

steps.title: Remove extra punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a hyphen, Choice B inserts a comma, and Choice C inserts a colon between the verb and its object. The sentence needs no punctuation after juxtapose. The answer is D.
